title: AA-to-BQ Message Envelope
description: PubSub message envelope carrying a D4M Associative Array row for BigQuery ingestion.

table_name.description: Target BigQuery table within the insight_metadata dataset.

payload.title: D4M Row Record
payload.description: A single row from a D4M Associative Array.

video_id.description: The unique identifier extracted from A.row[i].

ingested_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the Julia IC service processed this row.
